aboutus.hero_subtitle: Your ultimate destination for exploring music like never before
aboutus.intro_text: We're more than just a music database - we're a passionate community where fans, artists, and curious listeners come together to discover, share, and celebrate the world of music.
aboutus.feature_music_encyclopedia_desc: Dive deep into artist biographies, discographies, lyrics, and fascinating facts about your favorite musicians and bands.
aboutus.feature_playback_desc: Preview tracks via integrated streaming to discover new sounds effortlessly.
aboutus.feature_your_music_desc: Save songs, create playlists, comment, and connect with fellow music lovers.
aboutus.feature_community_desc: Users can suggest edits via comments, while admins ensure content stays up-to-date and reliable.
aboutus.feature_coming_soon_desc: Stay tuned for exciting new features and improvements.
aboutus.mission_text: At Know Your Music, we believe every song has a story. Whether you're a casual listener or a die-hard fan, our platform helps you uncover the details behind the music you love - and find your next favorite artist along the way.
aboutus.mission_cta: Join us and deepen your musical journey today!

privacy_pol.intro_text_start: Your privacy matters to us at
privacy_pol.intro_text_end: This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your personal data.
privacy_pol.what_we_collect_subtitle: We only gather the info needed to make Know Your Music work smoothly:
privacy_pol.basic_account_data_desc: Username, email, and password (hashed for security).
privacy_pol.music_preferences_desc: Artists you follow, tracks you save, and searches to improve recommendations.
privacy_pol.cookies_desc: To remember your login and settings (you can disable these in your browser).
privacy_pol.how_we_use_item1: To personalize your experience (e.g., recommend music you might like).
privacy_pol.how_we_use_item2: To let you comment, create collections, and interact with others.
privacy_pol.how_we_use_item3: To fix bugs and improve the site (we use anonymized analytics).
privacy_pol.what_we_dont_item1: Sell your data to third parties.
privacy_pol.what_we_dont_item2: Spam you - we'll only email you for important updates (like password resets).
privacy_pol.your_rights_item2: Opt out of cookies (though some features might break).
privacy_pol.your_rights_item3: Request your data (we'll send you a copy).

tos.intro_text: These terms outline the rules for using our service. By accessing our site, you agree to these conditions.
tos.your_account_item1: You're responsible for keeping your login info secure.
tos.your_account_item2: No fake names, spam, or impersonation - keep it real.
tos.your_account_item3: We can suspend accounts that break these rules.
tos.your_content_item1: Comments/edits must be respectful and accurate. No hate speech or misinformation.
tos.your_content_item2: By posting, you allow us to display it on Know Your Music (but you still own your words).
tos.your_content_item3: Don't upload illegal content (we'll remove it).
tos.copyright_item1: We don't host actual music files - just info about music (lyrics, artist details, etc.).
tos.copyright_item2_start: If you think something violates copyright, email us at
tos.our_rules_item1: Don't break the site (no hacking, scraping, or bots).
tos.our_rules_item2: Admins can edit/remove content to keep things accurate.
tos.disclaimer_item1: Music data comes from users and APIs. We try our best to keep information accurate and up to date.

comguidelines.intro_text: is a space for music lovers to share knowledge, discuss artists, and build a collaborative music database. To keep things fun and respectful, we have a few simple rules:
comguidelines.be_kind_item1: No hate speech, harassment, or personal attacks.
comguidelines.be_kind_item2: Disagree with someone? Debate the music, not the person.
comguidelines.be_kind_item3: Respect diverse tastes - what's 'bad music' to you might be someone else's favorite.
comguidelines.keep_accurate_item1: Fact-check before suggesting changes or new information (cite sources if possible).
comguidelines.keep_accurate_item2: Admins may correct or revert incorrect changes.
comguidelines.keep_accurate_item3: No intentional misinformation or spam (e.g., fake album releases).
comguidelines.contribute_item1: Comments/edits should add value - no off-topic rants or self-promotion.
comguidelines.contribute_item2: Found an error? Suggest a fix politely.
comguidelines.no_illegal_item1: Don't share pirated music, leaks, or explicit material without warning.
comguidelines.consequences_subtitle: Breaking these rules may lead to:
comguidelines.admin_section_text: Helpful, active users may be invited to join our moderation team!
